ValidationRule.description: Deal Reg Ext Req when its only Approved
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(ISCHANGED(Deal_Registration_Extension_Request__c), OR( AND(!ISPICKVAL( Deal_Registration_Status__c,'Approved'),!ISPICKVAL( Deal_Registration_Status__c,'Expired'),!ISPICKVAL( Deal_Registration_Status__c,'Pending Meeting'),!ISPICKVAL( Deal_Registration_Status__c,'Pending Conversion'),!ISPICKVAL(Deal_Registration_Status__c,'Escalated')), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Deal_Registration_Extension_Request__c),''), ISPICKVAL(Deal_Registration_Extension_Request__c,'2nd Deal Reg Ext. Req. for next 45 Days') )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Deal Registration can only be extended when it is Approved/Expired and cannot jump to 2nd Deal Reg Ext. Req without going through 1st Deal Reg Ext. Req.
